description.value:
At 2nd level, you gain access to Upgrades, to improve your Puppet Tool's performance.

Each Puppet Technique has its own exclusive list of Upgrades, listed below their features.

You start with 2 Upgrades, and gain additional Upgrades as indicated on the Puppet Master class table.

During a long rest, you can spend charges of your armorsmith kit or weaponsmith kit to swap out your Upgrades.

For each charge you spend, you can replace a number of Upgrades equal to your Intelligence Modifier.

During a full rest, while you have an armorsmith kit or weaponsmith kit, you can swap out any number of Upgrades or change your puppet's chassis.

Not all Upgrades are created equal.

Some Upgrades can only be acquired once you reach a certain level, shown on the class table and represented by material-based tiers.

For example, at 5th level, you can take up to three Wood tier Upgrades.

You can always choose to expend slots of higher tiers to gain more lower tier Upgrades.

For example, at 6th level, you choose to take five Wood tier Upgrades, and one Bronze tier Upgrade, or simply take six Wood tier Upgrades.
